channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: I'm a data editor at Google. Here are 3 most revealing questions people ask when no one's looking—and what it says about us - CNBC
item.description:
1. I'm a data editor at Google. Here are 3 most revealing questions people ask when no one's looking—and what it says about us  CNBC
  2. Our most Googled topics revealed - from asking 'how to talk to girls' to questioning our grossest bodily functions  The Sun
  3. ‘What We Ask Google: A Surprisingly Hopeful History of Humankind’  WGN-TV
  4. How Google search reflects real needs: the company's data editor explains  life.liga.net
  5. Momentous & Mundane Questions. A Common Language Misunderstood.  WMNF 88.5 FM

item.title: Louise Arbour Named as Canada’s Governor General - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Louise Arbour Named as Canada’s Governor General  The New York Times
  2. Louise Arbour to be installed Canada's next governor general June 8  CBC
  3. Carney appoints former war crimes prosecutor as Canada governor general  The Guardian
  4. Chris Selley: How can the Liberals possibly be this awful at picking governors general?  National Post
  5. What to know about Louise Arbour, Canada's next governor general  BBC

item.title: Up to 2cm a month: Nasa keeps track as Mexico City sinks into the ground - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Up to 2cm a month: Nasa keeps track as Mexico City sinks into the ground  The Guardian
  2. One of the planet’s biggest cities is sinking so rapidly it’s visible from space  CNN
  3. Mexico City is sinking up to 14 inches per year, satellite images show  Space
  4. Mexico City Is Sinking. A Powerful NASA Satellite Just Revealed How Fast  WIRED
  5. Mexico City is sinking so quickly, it can be seen from space  AP News

item.title: New Study Shows Risks of Amazon Deforestation. And Rewards of Protection. - The New York Times
item.description:
1. New Study Shows Risks of Amazon Deforestation. And Rewards of Protection.  The New York Times
  2. Deforestation-induced drying lowers Amazon climate threshold  Nature
  3. Deforestation could trigger Amazon tipping point in the 2030s  New Scientist
  4. Deforestation lessens Amazon rainfall—and climate change hastens that process, study finds  Phys.org
  5. Amazon Rainforest Near "Point Of No Return" At 1.5 Degrees Warming: Study  NDTV

item.title: After Hormuz, Southeast Asia Sees the Potential Value of Tolling the Strait of Malacca - Council on Foreign Relations
item.description:
1. After Hormuz, Southeast Asia Sees the Potential Value of Tolling the Strait of Malacca  Council on Foreign Relations
  2. Trump’s leaky Hormuz blockade needs Malacca control to work  Asia Times
  3. ASEAN urged to keep trade barriers low  BusinessWorld - BusinessWorld Online
  4. The Strait of Malacca Is Malaysia’s Industrial Spine  Geopolitical Monitor
  5. Indonesia’s Malacca Strait ‘toll’ proposal violates UNCLOS. Is there an alternative?  Indonesia at Melbourne

item.title: Executed Iranian prisoners detail abuse, torture ahead of their killing - The Jerusalem Post
item.description:
1. Executed Iranian prisoners detail abuse, torture ahead of their killing  The Jerusalem Post

item.title: Beware the Sudden Death of Vladimir Putin - Newsweek
item.description:
1. Beware the Sudden Death of Vladimir Putin  Newsweek
  2. Vladimir Putin Is Much Weaker Than You Think  Foreign Policy
  3. Unsettled Kremlin tightens security around Putin amid assassinations and coup fears, intel report says  CNN
  4. Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, May 4, 2026  Institute for the Study of War
  5. Vladimir Putin fears an assassination attempt and a coup, tensions among security services are rising, an EU intelligence agency says  Важные истории

item.title: Italian Prime Minister Shares Deepfake Nude Photo of Herself to Warn About AI Misuse - PetaPixel
item.description:
1. Italian Prime Minister Shares Deepfake Nude Photo of Herself to Warn About AI Misuse  PetaPixel
  2. Italy’s Meloni denounces deepfake photo as a political attack  AP News
  3. ‘Think before sharing,’ Giorgia Meloni says as AI-made lingerie image of her goes viral  The Guardian
  4. Italy's Meloni warns over AI deepfakes after false photos circulate  Reuters
  5. Italy’s PM slams sexualised AI-generated images of herself  Euronews.com
